data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for filtering by location/resource/time window.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to filter by location/resource/time window regardless of source domain. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for such filtering, but without specific evidence of its implementation or validation, the requirement cannot be confirmed.
gaps: No evidence of the ability to filter by location/resource/time window regardless of source domain.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this filtering requirement.
